task: Find out how many assists Chris Paul has been averaging in the current season.
graderReasoning: The agent reached Chris Paul's NBA.com player page and then the stats page at https://www.nba.com/stats/player/101108. The page explicitly showed APG 3.3 in the header and, on the Traditional Splits table for the selected Regular Season / Per Game view, the 2025-26 row listed AST as 3.3. The final answer matches the visible NBA.com data for the current season.
final_result_response: Chris Paul is averaging **3.3 assists per game** in the current **2025-26 regular season**, per his NBA.com stats page.
action_history: Opening NBA website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.nba.com/');
Opening Chris Paul player page: await page.locator('e326').click();
Opening Chris Paul player page: await openTab('https://www.nba.com/player/101108/chris-paul');
Verifying on Stats tab: await page.locator('e23').click();
